ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "ipc1" REAL /* Industrial Production Index 1 */,
  "ipc2" REAL /* Industrial Production Index 2 */,
  "ipc4" REAL /* Industrial Production Index 4 */,
  "ipc5" REAL /* Industrial Production Index 5 */,
  "ipcmag" REAL /* Composite Industrial Production Index */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "region_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data adjustment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data that was adjusted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., inflation adjustment, data correction) */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "adjusted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_adjustments_adjusted_by FOREIGN KEY ("adjusted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_adjustments_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_adjustments_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES economic_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_adjustments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES economic_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Notes or comments about the data
Unique identifier for each data source
Name of the contact person for the data source
Email of the contact person for the data source
Date when the data source was last updated
